description: AWS MSK dashboard built from CloudWatch-backed metrics ingested into SigNoz.
title: AWS MSK - OTLP

66cc2985-aa67-4635-a522-6d75347e984e.name: cluster_name
66cc2985-aa67-4635-a522-6d75347e984e.queryValue:
SELECT JSONExtractString(labels, 'cluster_name') as cluster_name
FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4_1day
WHERE metric_name = 'aws_kafka_active_controller_count_average'
GROUP BY cluster_name

d6b00a6c-154c-4d97-beea-b95162d09638.name: broker_id
d6b00a6c-154c-4d97-beea-b95162d09638.queryValue:
SELECT JSONExtractString(labels, 'broker_id') as broker_id
FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4_1day
WHERE metric_name = 'aws_kafka_connection_count_average'
  AND JSONExtractString(labels, 'cluster_name') = '{{.cluster_name}}'
GROUP BY broker_id

69166b65-c245-4484-9253-f9313f9b1e00.name: topic
69166b65-c245-4484-9253-f9313f9b1e00.queryValue:
SELECT JSONExtractString(labels, 'topic') as topic
FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4_1day
WHERE metric_name = 'aws_kafka_messages_in_per_sec_average'
  AND JSONExtractString(labels, 'cluster_name') = '{{.cluster_name}}'
GROUP BY topic

widgets.description: Only one controller per cluster should be active at any given time.
widgets.title: ActiveControllerCount

widgets.description: Total partition count across the selected MSK cluster.
widgets.title: GlobalPartitionCount

widgets.description: Offline partitions should remain at zero under normal cluster health.
widgets.title: OfflinePartitionsCount

widgets.description: Under-replicated partitions indicate replication lag or broker stress.
widgets.title: UnderReplicatedPartitions

widgets.title: ConnectionCount by Broker

widgets.description: Active authenticated client connections grouped by broker.
widgets.title: ClientConnectionCount by Broker

widgets.description: Incoming bytes per second handled by each selected broker.
widgets.title: BytesInPerSec by Broker

widgets.description: Outgoing bytes per second served by each selected broker.
widgets.title: BytesOutPerSec by Broker

widgets.description: Incoming messages per second across selected topics in the cluster.
widgets.title: MessagesInPerSec by Topic

widgets.description: Per-topic partition count for the selected MSK cluster.
widgets.title: PartitionCount by Topic

widgets.description: Broker log disk usage helps catch storage pressure before a cluster degrades.
widgets.title: KafkaDataLogsDiskUsed by Broker

widgets.description: Remaining EBS burst balance for brokers. Low values often precede throughput issues.
widgets.title: BurstBalance by Broker
